claim: Codex materially helped build, test, validate, and document this UiPath AgentHack service-recovery project.
private_chat_log_note: Local Codex thread/session metadata was inspected only as needed. Chat logs and shell snapshots are not committed or quoted because they may contain private unrelated context. The public evidence uses git branches, commits, repository docs, build-log entries, generated artifacts, and validation commands.
